Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-08 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
ATEX ranks #1 today with an exceptional 92.5 score, driven by extraordinary momentum across nearly all timeframes: 57% in one month, 155% in three months, and 364% over six months, though this sharp acceleration shows signs of overextension with a momentum signal of 2.27. The stock's 10-year return of 424% significantly outpaces its 5-year return of 75%, suggesting recent performance is the primary driver, and it trades above all major moving averages while outperforming SPY by 309% over the past year. VLO ranks second with a more balanced profile: steady long-term gains (453% over 10 years, 268% over 5 years) with consistent ratio passes across timeframes, and it demonstrates stronger relative stability with lower volatility than ATEX and outperformance versus SPY of 76-194% depending on the horizon. The data highlights a contrast between ATEX's explosive recent surge concentrated in medium-term windows and VLO's more sustained, diversified long-term momentum across multiple asset classes.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
